description: EventDash seed data for Sunrise Yoga Studio. Apply via admin API after site is running.

templates.title: Vinyasa Flow
templates.description: Dynamic, breath-linked movement that builds strength, flexibility, and focus. Led by Elena Rodriguez. All levels welcome. 60 minutes.

templates.title: Yin & Restorative
templates.description: Slow, deep stretches held for minutes at a time. Perfect for recovery, stress relief, and finding stillness. Led by Marcus Chen. 75 minutes.

templates.title: Hot Yoga
templates.description: Practice in a heated room to deepen stretches, detoxify, and build endurance. Led by Jasmine Park. Bring water and a towel. 60 minutes.

templates.title: Community Class
templates.description: Donation-based class open to everyone. A welcoming, inclusive practice for all bodies and all budgets. Led by rotating instructors. 60 minutes.

notes: Run `node seed/seed-events.mjs` after the site is running to populate EventDash with recurring class instances.
